dashboard.title: ✨ Eshow Welcome back, {name}.
dashboard.subtitle: Choose what you want to do next.
dashboard.menu_hint: 👇 Start with one of these 6 actions:
dashboard.account: 👤 My Account Account: {telegram_id} 💰 Balance Total: {balance} USD Available: {available} USD Pre-auth hold: {held} USD
dashboard.price_hint: 🎭 AI Face Swap Normal $0.05 | Standard $0.18 | Priority $0.35 🖌 Remove Watermark / Logo Normal $0.06 | Standard $0.216 | Priority $0.42
dashboard.billing_hint: ⏱ Charged by actual runtime seconds. Failed tasks are not charged and fees never exceed the pre-auth hold.

recharge.invoice: 💰 Amount: {amount} USD 🔗 Currency: {currency} ⏳ Expires in: {minutes} minutes Open the Plisio payment page below. Your balance will update automatically after payment is confirmed.
recharge.timeout_warning: ⏰ Please complete the transfer within {minutes} minutes
recharge.pending_invoice_exists: ⚠️ You have a pending top-up order. 💰 Amount: {amount} USD 🔗 Currency: {currency} ⏳ Expires in: {minutes} minutes Please keep using the payment link below to avoid duplicate orders.
recharge.success: ✅ Top-up successful! {amount} USD received. Current balance: {balance} USD.
recharge.cancelled: ❌ Top-up order has timed out and been cancelled.
recharge.invalid_amount: Please enter a valid amount (min 1 USD, max 10000 USD).
recharge.cancel_confirm: Order cancelled. If you have already paid, please contact support for manual review.

balance.title: 💰 Account Info
balance.user_not_found: No account found. Please use /start first.

errors.backend_transport: Cannot reach backend. Please try again later.
errors.backend_auth: Backend auth failed. Check API_KEY configuration.
errors.backend_config: Compute is not configured: set BACKEND_BASE_URL and API_KEY.
errors.unhandled: ❌ System error. Please try again later.

task.usage: Usage: /task followed by task code. Example: /task 791CC7EE
task.invalid_uuid: Task ID is not a valid UUID.
task.title: 📌 Task status
task.not_found: Task not found or access denied.

compute.ask_faces: AI Face Swap Send 1-4 face reference images at once. If you only have 1 image, the system will fill all 4 reference slots automatically. Send /cancel to abort.
compute.faces_received:
Face references received: {count}/{max}

You may send more, or continue to the next step.
compute.faces_full: Received 4 face references. The first 4 images will be used.
compute.need_faces: Please send at least 1 face reference image first.
compute.ask_target: Send 1 target image. This is the image you want to swap the face into.
compute.target_received:
Target image received.

Continue to confirm settings.
compute.target_already_received: The first target image is already selected. Cancel and start again to replace it.
compute.face_album_tail_ignored: Received another image from the face album. It will not be used as the target image.
compute.invalid_image: Please send an image. JPEG, PNG and WebP are supported.
compute.use_buttons: Images are ready. Please use the buttons below.
compute.missing_inputs: Task inputs are incomplete. Please start again.

remove_watermark.ask_image: 🖌 Remove Watermark / Logo Send 1 image to process. The system will automatically remove visible watermarks, logos, text overlays, or translucent marks. Send /cancel to abort.
remove_watermark.image_received:
✅ Image received.

Continue to confirm settings.
remove_watermark.image_already_received: The first image is already selected. Cancel and start again to replace it.
remove_watermark.confirm:
Confirm generation

Task type: Remove Watermark / Logo
Queue tier: {priority}
Pre-auth hold: {hold} USD

Billing: charged by actual runtime seconds. Failed tasks are not charged.
remove_watermark.missing_inputs: Task inputs are incomplete. Please start again.

batch.ask_archive: 🖌 Batch Remove Watermark / Logo Upload a zip, tar, or tar.gz archive. The original folder structure will be preserved and the processed results will be sent back as an archive. Send /cancel to abort.
batch.invalid_archive: Please upload a valid zip, tar, or tar.gz archive with up to 20 JPEG/PNG/WebP images.
batch.missing_archive: Archive data expired. Please start again.
batch.not_found: Batch not found or access denied.

common.error: ❌ Operation failed. Please try again later.
common.help_text:
/start - Open dashboard
/help - Help

The dashboard includes: My, AI Face Swap, Remove Watermark / Logo, Batch processing, Top up and Help.

Task history, transaction history and language settings are under My.
